title: Neon Heartline
finalOutput:
Release: Neon Heartline

Lyrics
Verse
We chase the signal through the dark tonight
Neon Heartline in the distance, glowing neon bright
An emotional anthem about rising through the dark and building a brighte
We keep the fire alive, we keep the engine humming

Pre-Chorus
Hold the line, let the pressure rise
Every dream is a spark in disguise

Chorus
Neon Heartline, we light it up
Turn the low tide into enough
From the silence into the flame
We build the future, we call your name

Verse
We chase the signal through the dark tonight
Neon Heartline in the distance, glowing neon bright
An emotional anthem about rising through the dark and building a brighte
We keep the fire alive, we keep the engine humming

Chorus
Neon Heartline, we light it up
Turn the low tide into enough
From the silence into the flame
We build the future, we call your name

Bridge
emotional, triumphant, modern hearts, steel nerves, midnight sky
We fall, we learn, we multiply

Chorus
Neon Heartline, we light it up
Turn the low tide into enough
From the silence into the flame
We build the future, we call your name

Arrangement
Genre: cinematic pop
BPM: 112
Key: A minor
Vibe: emotional, triumphant, modern
Mode: song
Vocal profile: male
Chorus strength: 80%
Length target: 150s
Structure: intro → verse → pre-chorus → chorus → verse → chorus → bridge → chorus → outro

Render Brief
Produce a full song in the style lane of cinematic pop.
Target BPM 112, key A minor, vibe emotional, triumphant, modern.
Vocal profile: male. Chorus strength 80%.
Build a release-ready master, 15s teaser, 30s hook cut, and cover art brief.
